ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence for the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence for the applicant */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant's residence */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the applicant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the applicant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the application */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Requested loan amount */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Number of months for the loan term */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applied to the loan */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Fees associated with the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score entry */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant associated with the credit score */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Credit score value */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the score was recorded */,
  "credit_agency" TEXT /* Name of the credit agency that reported the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant associated with the employment record */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company where the applicant is employed */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the applicant at the company */,
  "years_employed" REAL /* Number of years the applicant has been employed */,
  "monthly_income" REAL /* Monthly income from the current employment */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who defaulted */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan that was defaulted on */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date the default occurred */,
  "default_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan that was defaulted */,
  "default_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the default */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the default record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the default record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defaults_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the loan officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the officer works */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the loan officer */,
  "years_of_experience" REAL /* Number of years of experience in lending */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the officer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the officer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_officers_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "branch_location" TEXT /* Location of the branch */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the branch */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number for the branch */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the branch record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the branch record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being approved */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who approved the loan */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "approved_amount" REAL /* Amount that was approved for the loan */,
  "approval_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the officer about the approval decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the approval record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the approval record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_approvals_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_approvals_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rejections" (
  "rejection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rejection record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that was rejected */,
  "rejection_date" TEXT /* Date of rejection */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection */,
  "rejection_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the officer about the rejection decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rejection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rejection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rejection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rejections_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the officer about the application */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the officer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval criterion */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the approval criterion */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Description of the approval criterion */,
  "min_credit_score" INTEGER /* Minimum credit score required for approval */,
  "max_debt_to_income" REAL /* Maximum debt-to-income ratio allowed for approval */,
  "min_income" REAL /* Minimum income required for approval */,
  "min_employment_duration" REAL /* Minimum employment duration required for approval (in years) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., officer, admin) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the user is associated with */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "term_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan term in months */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate applied to the loan */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Fees associated with the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan term record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan term record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan purpose */,
  "purpose_description" TEXT /* Description of the loan purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan purpose record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan purpose record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., loan application, approval rate) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
